title: AXOtpCompletedEvent
description: Emitted when an OTP input is completed, providing the entered value and completion status.

sections.title: Event Definition
sections.description: TypeScript definition of the OTP completed event with inherited members expanded.

props.name: component
props.description: The sender component instance. Inherited from AXEvent.

props.name: htmlElement
props.description: The root native element associated with the component. Inherited from AXEvent.

props.name: isUserInteraction
props.description: Indicates whether the event was triggered by user interaction. Inherited from AXEvent.

props.name: value
props.description: The current value entered in the OTP input fields.

props.name: isCompleted
props.description: Indicates whether all OTP input fields have been filled.
